hero.lead: IATF d”ô suro jamibe lan cidajin. Shart”ôwa cidabe, falt”ôwa kaidabe-a, falt«Ěwa k”ôla k”ôrmai-a kuru kung”ôna faidat”ôbe-ad”ô na jamabe lan ruwot”ôna. Lamba ad”ôye na jili ruot”ôbe woso k”ôlanz”ôna-a futu k”ôrajinz”ô-a ro bayanjin.

header.title: Na do ruwowa d«Ě k«Ěn«Ěngat«Ěna d«Ěn

items: Shawari cidabe. Ka'ida'a kasatkata, archive-a, kuru walt…ô-a g…ônat…ô'a sandiya ruwot…ô k…ôla lamarra au hawarra'a ro suro napt…ôram tawatkatabe lan, kuru suro kakkadi cidaye d…ôn fasaltin. daft«ĚramK«Ěndod«Ě .

Firt”ôwa ro kalakk”ôna. Bayanna amsobe rowatad…ô suro cidaram IATF GitHubben, website ad…ôn, au sandi indisoyen kasatkata. Bayanna ad…ô waneye sumoyin, g…ônat…ôyin, au walt…ô bayanna burosalakbed…ôga walt…ô fasaltin futu m…ôrad…ôt…ôna kuru bayanna k…ôlanzabe ng…ôlaro f…ôlejin ba ro. Shawari g…ôrat…ôg…ôbed…ô suro bayanna jamabe ro kasatkat…ô sa sandiye cidaram au shawaria k…ôrmaibe f…ôlezayinno. Bayannad…ô search engine indexing lan bowot…ôyin sa nzundu nzundube faidat…ôro waljiya. View records: first publication request pending.
Kaida d”ô falt”ôna. Falt«Ědo kaidabe woson badit«Ěd«Ě shima jamaro walz«Ěnama suro napt«Ěbe taganasbe lad«Ěn. K«Ěndaram GitHubbeK«Ěndod«Ě .
Falt«Ě gomnatibed«Ě faltin. Futu hawarra k”ôla k”ôrmaibe d”ôga k”ôn”ôngat”ôg”ôna d”ô, futu k”ôlanz”ôga s”ôd”ôna lan kara. iatf-website Repository d«Ě. hawar k«Ěn«Ěngabe suro GitHub yen.
Karewa faidat”ôbe d”ô. IATFye kung…ôna cidabe-a kung…ôna cidabed…ô-a rowot…ôyin. 2022 lan, kung…ôna zaumaro faidatainma sandima su domainbewo.
Not«Ěwa kalkalz«Ěg«Ěbe. Notes from any coordinated review or decision live in GitHub Discussions on the relevant repository view K”ôla lamar shimad”ôyen k«Ěla iatf-website karewa g”ônat”ôbe.

paragraphs: IATFye garno jamabe d…ôn awo gana s…ôt…ôna. 2022 lan, kung…ôna cidabe zauro faidatainma sandima su donyi domainbewo.
Ka'ida ad”ô k”ôla kung”ôna k”ôr”ônt”ôg”ôram k”ôriwuye g”ônyi. Shi d”ô kakkadi k”ôlanz”ôbe k”ôn”ôngat”ôbe d”ôwo karewa IATFbe online lan faidatinma d”ôro.

paragraphs: Karewa laa so d«Ě g«Ěnat«Ěram jamabe d«Ěro g«Ěnyi:

Ruwo k«Ělanz«Ěbe do faidat«Ěma basro kalak«Ět«Ě nankaro kawu sha kasats«Ěnyi, g«Ěnyi au k«Ělt«Ěnyi ro.
